title: 旅游场景：问题处理
method: 学习 -> 测验 -> 跟读 -> 通过后进入下一句
sources: Manual curation with public travel phrase references checked for naturalness.

units.phrase: My luggage has not arrived yet.
units.exampleEn: My luggage has not arrived yet. Could you help me file a report?
units.exampleZh: 我的行李还没有到。你能帮我登记一下吗？
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 my luggage not come。has not arrived yet 更准确。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合在机场行李服务柜台说明问题。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说明你的行李还没到。
quiz.sampleAnswer: My luggage has not arrived yet.

units.phrase: There seems to be a problem with the room.
units.exampleEn: There seems to be a problem with the room. The air conditioner is not working.
units.exampleZh: 房间好像有点问题。空调不能用。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要直接说 room has problem，there seems to be 更礼貌。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合向前台反馈房间设备、清洁或噪音问题。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文礼貌反馈房间有问题。
quiz.sampleAnswer: There seems to be a problem with the room.

units.phrase: Which line should I take to get downtown?
units.meaningZh: 去市中心我应该坐哪条线？
units.exampleEn: Which line should I take to get downtown? I am trying to avoid transfers.
units.exampleZh: 去市中心我应该坐哪条线？我想尽量少换乘。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 take what line go city center。which line should I take 更自然。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合地铁、公交、机场快线等交通场景。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文问去市中心坐哪条线。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Which line should I take to get downtown?

units.exampleEn: Has the flight been delayed? The gate information changed on the screen.
units.exampleZh: 航班延误了吗？屏幕上的登机口信息变了。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 flight delay already? 完整问句是 has the flight been delayed?
units.usageNoteZh: 适合机场确认航班状态、登机口变化和改签信息。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问航班是否延误。

units.phrase: Is it possible to get a refund?
units.exampleEn: Is it possible to get a refund? The tour was canceled because of the weather.
units.exampleZh: 可以退款吗？这个行程因为天气取消了。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 can refund money。get a refund 是固定说法。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合门票、活动、交通、酒店政策沟通。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文礼貌询问是否可以退款。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Is it possible to get a refund?

units.phrase: I think I left my wallet in the taxi.
units.meaningZh: 我觉得我把钱包落在出租车上了。
units.exampleEn: I think I left my wallet in the taxi. Is there a lost and found office?
units.exampleZh: 我觉得我把钱包落在出租车上了。有失物招领处吗？
units.commonMistakeZh: left my wallet 表示落下了，不要说 lost in taxi 这种不完整表达。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合说明你可能把东西落在某处，需要别人帮你查。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说明钱包可能落在出租车上。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I think I left my wallet in the taxi.

units.exampleEn: I am not feeling well. Is there a clinic nearby?
units.exampleZh: 我感觉不太舒服。附近有诊所吗？
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 my body not good。I am not feeling well 是最常用说法。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合旅行中寻求医疗、药店或休息帮助。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说你感觉不舒服。

units.phrase: Is this area safe at night?
units.exampleEn: Is this area safe at night? I may need to walk back to the hotel.
units.exampleZh: 这个区域晚上安全吗？我可能需要走回酒店。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 here night safe? area safe at night 更完整。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合向酒店前台、当地人或司机确认安全情况。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问这个区域晚上是否安全。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Is this area safe at night?
